label: Showcase: Product catalog (apps)
description: A Product content type with blurbs, optional card image URLs, sample prices, and three sample apps. Images in media_seed download from images.unsplash.com into the media library and attach as featured images. Import from Admin → Tools → Blueprints and enable “Import content entries”. Public URLs: /products

content_types.name: Products
content_types.description: Shippable apps and platforms — blurbs, hero images, prices, and rich detail for each listing.

fields.label: Blurb
fields.help_text: Short pitch for cards on /products and search snippets.

fields.label: Price
fields.help_text: Shown on the product card and detail page (e.g. From $499/mo or $12,000 one-time).

fields.label: Buy now
fields.help_text: Primary CTA on the product page (checkout, signup, or external purchase link).

fields.label: Book a demo
fields.help_text: Optional second CTA (Calendly, demo request, or trial).

fields.label: Card image URL
fields.help_text: Optional external image (HTTPS) when you are not using the featured image from the media library.

fields.label: Details
fields.help_text: Longer story, features, and pricing notes.

content_entries.title: SignalBridge
content_entries.seo_description: Reliable delivery, webhooks, and compliance-friendly messaging for product teams.

field_values.excerpt: Enterprise-grade SMS and transactional messaging with dashboards, retries, and carrier-aware routing — the serious upgrade from a basic SMS gateway.
field_values.body:
SignalBridge is built for teams who outgrew ad-hoc gateways. You get structured APIs, delivery receipts, and quiet hours — without duct-taping five vendors together.

  • REST + webhook events
  • Multi-region failover
  • Role-scoped API keys

License the stack or bring us in for a custom build on your cloud.

content_entries.title: Campus Compass
content_entries.seo_title: Campus Compass — learning paths for schools & teams
content_entries.seo_description: Structured curricula, progress signals, and admin tooling for modern education programs.

field_values.excerpt: A calm learning platform for cohorts: pathways, checkpoints, and coach-ready analytics — more focused than a generic “education app” bolted onto a CMS.
field_values.body:
Campus Compass helps schools and training teams ship structured programs without wrestling a generic LMS. Learners see a clear path; leads see completion and risk flags early.

  • Modular learning paths
  • Manager and instructor views
  • Export-friendly progress

content_entries.title: Casa Lingua
content_entries.seo_description: Conversation-first Spanish lessons with spaced repetition and real-world scenarios.

field_values.excerpt: Conversation-led Spanish with spaced repetition and bite-sized scenarios — friendlier than drill-only apps and more focused than “learn everything” marketplaces.
field_values.body:
Casa Lingua treats Spanish as something you use, not only memorize. Daily prompts, audio-first drills, and gentle review cycles keep intermediate learners moving without burnout.

  • Scenario-based dialogues
  • Offline-friendly packs
  • Streaks that forgive real life
